paper_metadata.title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
paper_metadata.abstract: By decomposing the image formation process into a sequential application of denoising autoencoders, diffusion models (DMs) achieve state-of-the-art synthesis results on image data and beyond. Additionally, their formulation allows for a guiding mechanism to control the image generation process without retraining. However, since these models typically operate directly in pixel space, optimization of powerful DMs often consumes hundreds of GPU days and inference is expensive due to sequential evaluations. To enable DM training on limited computational resources while retaining their quality and flexibility, we apply them in the latent space of powerful pretrained autoencoders. In contrast to previous work, training diffusion models on such a representation allows for the first time to reach a near-optimal point between complexity reduction and detail preservation, greatly boosting visual fidelity. By introducing cross-attention layers into the model architecture, we turn diffusion models into powerful and flexible generators for general conditioning inputs such as text or bounding boxes and high-resolution synthesis becomes possible in a convolutional manner. Our latent diffusion models (LDMs) achieve a new state of the art for image inpainting and highly competitive performance on various tasks, including unconditional image generation, semantic scene synthesis, and super-resolution, while significantly reducing computational requirements compared to pixel-based DMs. Code is available at https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion .

extraction_data.organization: Ludwig Maximilian University Of Munich & Iwr, Heidelberg University, Germany
extraction_data.innovation: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) apply diffusion models in the latent space of a pretrained autoencoder, enabling high-resolution image synthesis with significantly reduced computational cost for both training and inference while preserving high visual fidelity.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly stated in the provided text
extraction_data.extension: Introduces cross-attention layers into the model architecture to enable powerful and flexible conditioning on inputs such as text, bounding boxes, and semantic maps.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with reduced computational cost
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image synthesis, unconditional image generation, image inpainting, super-resolution, semantic image synthesis
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces latent diffusion models (LDMs) that operate in a compressed latent space learned via a perceptual autoencoder, enabling high-resolution image synthesis with improved efficiency and quality compared to pixel-based diffusion models.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, conditional image synthesis, semantic image editing, text-to-image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and high-fidelity generative modeling
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism in the UNet backbone to condition on text or semantic maps via a domain-specific encoder τθ.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces latent diffusion models (LDMs) that operate in a compressed latent space learned via a perceptual autoencoder, enabling high-resolution image synthesis with improved efficiency and quality compared to pixel-based diffusion models.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, conditional image synthesis, semantic image editing, text-to-image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and high-fidelity generative modeling
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism in the UNet backbone to condition on text or semantic maps via a domain-specific encoder τθ.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) use a fixed latent space with a variational autoencoder (VAE) for perceptual compression, enabling high-resolution image synthesis with improved sample quality and mode coverage. The model leverages cross-attention for conditioning on text and semantic maps, allowing flexible and high-fidelity generation.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: CelebA-HQ, FFHQ, LSUN-Churches, LSUN-Bedrooms, ImageNet, Flickr-Landscapes
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism in the UNet backbone to condition on text or semantic maps via a domain-specific encoder τθ.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with high perceptual quality and strong generalization across diverse image generation tasks
extraction_data.application: Unconditional image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting, image-to-image translation
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) enable high-resolution image synthesis by training in the latent space of a variational autoencoder, achieving state-of-the-art results with fewer parameters and compute. The model uses a diffusion process in latent space with guidance from classifiers trained at each noise scale.
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism in the UNet backbone to condition on text or semantic maps via a domain-specific encoder τθ.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and high-fidelity generative modeling
extraction_data.application: Image generation, conditional image synthesis, semantic image editing, text-to-image generation
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces latent diffusion models (LDMs) that operate in a compressed latent space learned via a perceptual autoencoder, enabling high-resolution image synthesis with improved efficiency and quality compared to pixel-based diffusion models.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, conditional image synthesis, semantic image editing, text-to-image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and high-fidelity generative modeling
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism in the UNet backbone to condition on text or semantic maps via a domain-specific encoder τθ.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a latent diffusion model (LDM) trained on a compressed latent space of images, enabling high-resolution image synthesis. The model uses classifier-free guidance and convolutional sampling strategies to generate images larger than the native training resolution.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale image dataset (implied from context: ImageNet, LAION, etc., but not explicitly named in provided text)
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image super-resolution, image inpainting, image-to-image translation
extraction_data.extension: Classifier-free guidance enables flexible conditioning during inference without requiring a separate classifier.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) use a variational autoencoder (VAE) to compress images into a lower-dimensional latent space, enabling efficient training and sampling. The model employs cross-attention mechanisms to condition on text or spatial layout inputs, allowing high-resolution image synthesis from complex prompts.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: MS-COCO validation set, Open Images, ImageNet
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and flexible conditional generation
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: The LDM-4 model uses a latent diffusion framework with cross-attention conditioning and classifier-free guidance, enabling high-quality image generation with reduced parameter count and computational cost compared to prior diffusion models.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: MS-COCO validation set, Open Images, ImageNet
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and flexible conditional generation
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: The emphLDM-4 (big) variant uses a larger architecture with enhanced attention mechanisms and improved conditioning, achieving state-of-the-art performance in image quality and diversity while maintaining efficiency.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: MS-COCO validation set, Open Images, ImageNet
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and flexible conditional generation
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: LDM-1 is a pixel-based conditional diffusion model without a first-stage VAE, used as a baseline to compare the efficiency and quality of latent-space diffusion models.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: MS-COCO validation set, Open Images, ImageNet
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient and flexible conditional generation
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Text-to-image generation, semantic layout-based image synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: LDM-BSR is a generic super-resolution model trained with diverse image degradation processes, enabling robust performance on images not following standard bicubic downsampling.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diverse degradation handling
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) enable high-resolution image synthesis by training in the latent space of a variational autoencoder, achieving state-of-the-art results with fewer parameters and compute. The model uses a diffusion process in latent space with guidance from classifiers trained at each noise scale.
extraction_data.application: Class-conditional image generation, layout-to-image synthesis, super-resolution
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Class-conditional image generation with classifier guidance
extraction_data.extension: Classifier-free guidance enables flexible control over generation without requiring separate classifier training.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
